connections.gloss: apparel, clothed with, clothing, garment, raiment, vestment, vesture.
apparel, cloth(-es, ing), garment, lap, rag, raiment, robe, [idiom] very (treacherously), vesture, wardrobe.

connections.def: from hennumi (to clothe); dress:--apparel, clothing, raiment,

connections.gloss: apparel, cloth(-es, -ing), garment, raiment. Compare H8008 (שַׂלְמָה).
